hero.title: Warm evenings in Almancil.
hero.subtitle: Since 1986. Picanha on the grill, full tables and faces we already know by sight.
hero.sideTitle: For decades we have looked after everyone who walks through this door.
hero.sideText: Almancil families, long-standing regulars and visitors from Quinta do Lago or Vale do Lobo find the same welcome, the same attention and the same unhurried pace.
slidesAlt: Outdoor terrace — warm Algarve evenings at Figueiral.
Fire and signature grill work at Figueiral.
Grilled prawns — produce and fire at the table.
Dining room tables in warm light — atmosphere and service at Figueiral.
Chateaubriand on the stone — the house signature.

intro.title: A house where the table knows who returns.
intro.body: In 1986 we opened in Almancil with regional produce, fire on the grill and a welcoming room. Four decades on, many faces at the table are regulars — and that says everything.

highlights: Fire on the grill and plates that arrive hot at the table
Bottles gathered over the years to keep conversation going
Guests who have been coming for one, two or three decades
A team regulars already know almost by sight

statement.text: Figueiral was not built in a year. It was built through repeated dinners, familiar faces and the belief that welcoming well means caring about the detail.
statement.caption: In Almancil, some people simply call us «our restaurant»

atmosphere.imageAlt: Warm light across the dining room as the evening stretches at Restaurante Figueiral.

meat.title: Brazilian picanha — grilled, sliced at the table.
meat.body: The dish the press cites and guests order almost by reflex. Careful preparation, the feeling of home — generous meat, visible fire, conversation around it.
meat.note: Meat, heat and time. The rest takes care of itself.

wine.title: Bottles that keep the evening company, not dominate the table.
wine.body: Labels gathered over the years — for picanha, for fish, for the dinner that runs late. If you want a suggestion, ask: we know the regulars by heart.
wine.note: Wine by the glass or bottle — whatever keeps the table talking.

legacy.title: A house that grew with those who came back.
legacy.body: Opening in 1986 meant believing Almancil could have international cooking with the warmth of a family table. Today, part of who we are is the guests who have stayed with us for years — and the team that learns names and preferences.
legacy.imageAlt: Ivan and Cláudia at the reception of Restaurante Figueiral.

terrace.title: Open air, warm light and the calm pace of Almancil.
terrace.body: When the weather allows, the table moves outside — close to Quinta do Lago, Vale do Lobo, Vilamoura and Quarteira, but with the ease of being at home in the Algarve.

contextLink.label: Quinta do Lago, Vale do Lobo, Vilamoura and Quarteira

cta.title: Reserve your table for an evening without hurry.
cta.body: For dinner for two, family meals or friends staying in the area. Call or book online — we will seat you as you should be.

reviews.title: Words from those who keep coming back.

items.quote: Picanha as it should be, attentive service and a room where you stay longer than planned.
items.author: M.R., regular since 2019

items.quote: We always return when we are at Quinta. Never fails — picanha, prawns, bottle open.
items.author: T.K., returning visitor

items.quote: We have known Ivan for years. Always feels like home, even on a busy Saturday.
items.author: J.S., guest since 2021

intro.title: More than serving — for decades we have looked after everyone at our table.
intro.body: Our story begins in 1986, when the dream was simple: a reference for international cooking, yes, but above all a place of welcome in Almancil. Regional produce, attention to detail and the same warmth as always — that is how the story continues.

feature.title: The secret of a good house is the table and the team.
feature.body: Guests who have been coming for years already know the faces on the floor. Looking after people well is not theatre: it is memory — knowing when someone prefers their usual table, when the evening needs more time, when a child needs something simple. The dedication of each person lets the kitchen surprise without losing consistency.

faces.name: Olivia
faces.quote: A discreet presence, guest memory and attention to detail.

faces.name: Eraldo
faces.quote: The rhythm of the grill, served with precision and consistency.

faces.name: Ivonaldo
faces.quote: Fire, preparation and the continuity of a house tradition.

cards.title: Faces that return
cards.body: Regulars, Algarve families and international visitors who have come back often enough to no longer need a menu.

cards.title: Detail in daily life
cards.body: From how the room is laid out to what lands on the plate — we want every dinner to run as it should, without unnecessary formality.

cards.title: A team with memory
cards.body: Those who work with us know the pace of the house, know the tables, know the guests and treat each night with the same dedication.

intro.title: An archive of reputation built over decades.
intro.lead: Over the years, Figueiral has been mentioned by publications tied to food, travel, lifestyle and Algarve culture — reflecting the consistency of a house built in Almancil since 1986.

press.editorialNote: This text is an editorial summary prepared by Restaurante Figueiral. To read the full piece, visit the original article at the publication.

intro.title: Fire first. Conversation after.
intro.body: A grill-led menu — dishes to share, bottle open, the calm pace of those in no hurry to leave.

hero.title: The cooking begins at the fire and ends in conversation.
hero.body: Sliced picanha, garlic prawns, fish of the day — dishes we know by heart and guests order with confidence. Not a menu to impress; a menu to return to.
hero.note: Pick something from the fire, open a bottle and let the evening unfold.

interludes.title: Warm bread, an open bottle and dishes to share.
interludes.body: Dinner finds another rhythm when the table fills with plates in the middle and conversation loses its closing time.

categories.title: To Begin
categories.description: To open the table: warm bread, olive oil, cured meats, vegetables — the first gesture before the grill.

editorial.label: Opening
editorial.note: Starters to get conversation and appetite moving together.

items.name: Garlic Prawns
items.description: Hot prawns in garlic and olive oil, flame in the pan — one of the dishes most often ordered to share.

items.name: Goat's Cheese with Apple, Honey and Walnuts
items.description: Creamy goat's cheese with apple, honey and walnuts — sweet and savoury to open the table in good conversation.

items.name: Smoked Salmon with Fresh Cheese
items.description: Smoked salmon with fresh cheese — light, direct, ideal to share before the grill.

categories.title: Signature Meat
categories.description: Cuts for the grill, warm sauces and sides that belong at the table — with picanha at the centre, as it has been for many years.

editorial.label: On the fire
editorial.note: Grilled meat, sliced and served generously — the heart of the house.

items.name: Brazilian-Style Picanha
items.description: The star of the menu: grilled over fire, sliced at the table, served with the classic sides regulars know by heart.

items.name: Chateaubriand on the Stone
items.description: The tip of the fillet mignon served on a hot stone — keeps its heat at the table. Served for one person.

items.name: Tournedos with Roquefort Cheese Sauce
items.description: Tender beef with a creamy Roquefort cheese sauce — a table classic for those who like their meat with bold flavour.

categories.title: From the Algarve
categories.description: Fish, seafood and coastal freshness to balance the table — regional produce, cooked simply.

editorial.label: Origin
editorial.note: Olive oil, lemon and herbs — the sea as it should be, without excess adornment.

items.name: Grilled Sea Bass
items.description: Sea bass on the grill, Algarve olive oil, herbs and lemon — light, direct, made for sharing.

items.name: Sole with Prawns
items.description: Fresh sole with prawns — light, direct, typical of the Algarve.

items.name: Sea Bass Fillet with Mustard
items.description: Sea bass fillet with mustard sauce — a house classic, gently tangy and full of character.

categories.title: Desserts
categories.description: Sweet endings to close the night — or an excuse to stay a little longer at the table.

editorial.label: Finish
editorial.note: To share, or to finish with a small Port wine.

items.name: Caramelised Creme Brulee
items.description: Silky custard, sugar burnt on the spot — simple, classic, comforting.

items.name: Profiteroles
items.description: Choux puffs filled and finished with chocolate — light, indulgent, a classic many regulars order.

items.name: Apple Tart
items.description: Warm apple tart, served without hurry — a house dessert that closes the evening well.

intro.title: Every bottle has its place at the table — ask us which one is yours.
intro.body: Over the years we have gathered Portuguese labels that make sense here: for picanha, for fish, for that dinner that stretches without hurry. If you want a suggestion, just ask.

feature.title: Wines chosen for the table — meat, fish and conversation.
feature.body: Reds for the grill, whites for the day's fish, bottles to celebrate without theatre. The list grew with our guests and the evenings that repeat.

moments: Portuguese reds for picanha and fire-grilled meats
Fresh whites for Algarve fish and terrace lunches
Bottles for family dinners and occasions that deserve time

intro.title: Figueiral in images — fire, table, terrace.
intro.body: Real photographs from the house: the grill, the cellar, guests at the table and the warm light of Almancil.

intro.title: Call or book online — there's a table for you.
intro.body: Online or by phone — we confirm availability and seat you as you should be seated.

widget.title: Book a table — Restaurante Figueiral
widget.fallbackBody: Call or reach out via contact if you need help with groups, special occasions or changes.

bookingSuccess.title: Your table is booked.
bookingSuccess.body: We look forward to welcoming you at Figueiral. You'll receive your confirmation by email. See you soon.

subscriptionPending.body2: Click the link in the email we've just sent you.
subscriptionPending.footnote: Your subscription won't be complete until you click the confirmation link.

subscriptionConfirmed.title: Subscription confirmed
subscriptionConfirmed.body1: Thank you for confirming. From now on, you'll receive news from Restaurante Figueiral.
subscriptionConfirmed.footnote: Seasonal menus, evenings on the terrace and moments from the restaurant.

intro.title: Find us in Almancil, close to Quinta do Lago and Vale do Lobo.
intro.body: Plan your visit for picanha, wine and warm family hospitality in the heart of the Algarve.

footer.closingPhrase: A house in Almancil — fire, wine and tables many already think of as their own.
footer.description: Since 1986, Figueiral has been fire on the grill, a bottle shared and the certainty that those who come once often come back.
footer.locationNote: In Almancil, between Quinta do Lago, Vale do Lobo, Vilamoura and Quarteira.

consent.bannerTitle: We use cookies to measure site performance and advertising campaigns
consent.bannerBody: Strictly necessary cookies keep the site working. With your consent, we also use analytics cookies (Google Analytics 4) and marketing cookies (Google Ads and Meta Pixel) for statistics, conversions and retargeting.
consent.bannerNote: You can accept, reject non-essential cookies or manage preferences. Read more in our
consent.preferencesIntro: Choose the categories you allow. You can change this decision at any time via the “Manage cookies” link in the footer.

necessary.title: Necessary
necessary.description: Essential for the site to work and to remember your cookie choice. These cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Google Analytics 4 (GA4) — aggregated statistics on visits and site usage, to improve content and experience.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.description: Google Ads (AW-624854441) and Meta Pixel (1825830558822025) — conversion measurement, remarketing and advertising campaigns.

privacy.title: Privacy and cookie policy
privacy.intro: This page factually describes how figueiral.pt uses cookies and similar technologies. The data controller is Restaurante Figueiral (info@figueiral.pt).

necessary.title: Necessary cookies
necessary.body: These include storing your consent preference (first-party localStorage). They allow the site to function and honour your choice on future visits.

analytics.title: Google Analytics 4
analytics.body: Measures in aggregate how visitors use the site (pages viewed, traffic source, device). Only activated with consent in the Analytics category. Uses Google Consent Mode v2 (analytics_storage).

marketing.title: Google Ads and Meta Pixel
marketing.body: Google Ads (ID AW-624854441) records conversions and campaign events, including “Reserve” clicks and visits to the reservations page. Meta Pixel (ID 1825830558822025) measures visits and enables retargeting on Meta platforms. Both are only activated with consent in the Marketing category (ad_storage, ad_user_data, ad_personalization).

control.title: How to change or withdraw consent
control.body: Reopen the cookie panel via the “Manage cookies” link in the site footer, change categories or reject non-essential cookies. You can also clear cookies in your browser or use blocking extensions.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For privacy or cookie questions: info@figueiral.pt.
